# Dhaatrik Chowdhury — Full Site Content for LLM Indexing

> This is the extended version of llms.txt containing detailed content summaries for each page and blog post on dhaatrik.github.io. This file is intended for LLM crawlers and AI agents seeking comprehensive context about the site's content. **Site version: v4.0.1.**

---

## About the Author

**Dhaatrik Chowdhury** is an Entrepreneur and AI Engineer based in India. He has approximately 9 years of experience tutoring students in physics and mathematics across various formats — from school classrooms of 30–40 students, to offline coaching centers, one-on-one mentoring, and online sessions for NRI and international students. He has guided roughly 200 students over this period.

He is also known by his nickname **"Dhaatu"**, and his students affectionately call him **"Dhaatu Bhaiyaa"** (Hindi for "Big Brother Dhaatu"). This name became the basis for his YouTube channel, **DBS Classes** (Dhaatu Bhaiyaa's Classes).

### Core Philosophy
> "Education Is Not Free BUT KNOWLEDGE IS FREE" — and must be shared with "ZERO TERMS AND CONDITIONS"

### Professional Focus Areas
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning engineering
- Full-stack web development (React, TypeScript, Python, TensorFlow)
- Physics simulation and orbital mechanics
- Educational content creation and pedagogy

### Social Profiles
- GitHub: https://github.com/dhaatrik
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/dhaatrik
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/dhaatrik
- Medium: https://medium.com/@dhaatrik

---

## Pages

### Home (https://dhaatrik.github.io/)
The landing page features a dynamic greeting based on time of day, a hero section introducing Dhaatrik as an Entrepreneur & AI Engineer, a showcase of 4 featured projects, a tech stack marquee, and the 3 most recent blog posts.

### Personnel (https://dhaatrik.github.io/personnel/)
A detailed personnel file covering Dhaatrik's background, education, work experience, and technical capabilities. Styled as a classified dossier with a technical/military aesthetic.

### Projects (https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/)
A dedicated archive displaying Dhaatrik Chowdhury's complete engineering directory. Displays card previews for all 12 projects.

Each project card includes:
- **IMPACT.LOG**: A 1–5 neon segment bar (`role="meter"`, `aria-label="Impact level: N out of 5"`, `aria-valuenow`, `aria-valuemin`, `aria-valuemax`) showing development difficulty/pain level.
- **[ FUCKUP LOG ]**: An honest one-sentence teaser describing the biggest mistake or failure in the project.
- **SYS.STATUS telemetry**: A live-animated monospace status line (e.g., `STATUS: V4_IN_DEV // DB: OFF_LINE_FIRST // SYNC: LOCAL`) with a pulsing `telemetry-keyword` class.
- **Mission tags**: Tech stack and domain tags.

### Pedagogy (https://dhaatrik.github.io/pedagogy/)
Dedicated to Dhaatrik's teaching philosophy and the DBS Classes YouTube channel. Contains:
- The founding story and core philosophy
- Teaching methodology (sibling-centric model, kitchen physics, outdoor experiments)
- A video archive grid of all 20 DBS Classes YouTube videos with subject filtering
- An honest reflection on the channel's cessation due to inconsistency

### Transmissions (https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/)
The blog index page listing all published articles ("transmissions") with reading times, dates, and tags.

Features a terminal-style search widget implementing the **WAI-ARIA 1.2 Combobox pattern** (no-popup listbox variant):
- Input: `role="combobox"`, `aria-autocomplete="list"`, `aria-expanded`, `aria-activedescendant`
- Results container: `role="listbox"`  
- Each result card: `role="option"`, unique `id="search-result-N"`, `aria-selected`
- Keyboard nav: `/` to focus, ArrowDown to navigate results, ArrowUp to return to input, Escape to clear
- Supports multi-term fuzzy matching (space-delimited) and `#tag` shorthand
- Highlights matched text in result card titles and tags

---

## Blog Posts (Full Summaries)

### Why DeltaV Lab Exists — and What It Actually Is
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-why-and-what/
**Published:** 2026-06-28
**Tags:** aerospace, deltav-lab, simulation

First-person origin story for DeltaV Lab (github.com/dhaatrik/professional-rocket-launch-simulation). Motivation: bridge Kerbal Space Program intuition and engineering auditability without STK licensing. Defines concrete scope — VAB vehicle assembly, Mission Control flight sim, optional telemetry.html second screen, 50Hz Web Worker physics with SharedArrayBuffer. Audience: students, hobbyists, self — explicitly not range-safety certification. Features: DSL flight computer, FTS, fault injector, checklist, black box CSV export. Honest contrast between README "engineering-grade" marketing and site diary truth. Cross-links to science and limitations transmissions.

### The Science Inside DeltaV Lab — Forces, Integration, and Flight Software
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-science/
**Published:** 2026-06-29
**Tags:** aerospace, deltav-lab, physics, simulation

Technical transmission grounded in professional-rocket-launch-simulation repo source. Architecture: RK4 integration at FIXED_DT=0.02s (50Hz) in PhysicsWorker.ts, SharedArrayBuffer telemetry, main-thread paint only. Physics: inverse-square gravity, variable-mass thrust with sea-level/vacuum Isp, exponential atmosphere (7km scale height, density LUT to 200km), dynamic pressure drag, layered wind + Dryden gusts, CP-vs-CoM aero stability, thermal ablation. Orbital mechanics: Vis-Viva, Keplerian elements, Hohmann transfers, ground track with Earth rotation. DSL flight computer (WHEN/THEN) with ALTITUDE, VELOCITY, APOGEE, DYNAMIC_PRESSURE conditions. Safety: FTS, checklist, fault injector. Vitest validates analytical cases — not flight telemetry. Notes 2D scope ceiling.

### Why DeltaV Lab Is Not Professional-Grade (Despite What the README Says)
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-not-professional-grade/
**Published:** 2026-06-30
**Tags:** aerospace, deltav-lab, fuckups, simulation

Honest audit distinguishing implemented rigor from industry trust. verification/ folder contains UI/tooltip tests — no Falcon 9 or Electron flight-telemetry V&V. Gaps from path_to_perfection.md: no Monte Carlo dispersion, no 6DOF/slosh/TVC dynamics, no NRLMSISE-00/ECMWF wind, no Rust/WASM batch backend, no HIL/CCSDS, no pip-install API, no hosted zero-install demo. Browser 50Hz worker cannot scale to 10k-run ensembles. README "hyper-realistic" vs. repo roadmap admitted openly. Teaching sandbox excels; range-safety sign-off does not.

### What Is Next for DeltaV Lab — A Roadmap to Professional-Grade Launch Simulation
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-whats-next/
**Published:** 2026-07-01
**Tags:** aerospace, deltav-lab, simulation, roadmap

Phased evolution plan from browser teaching sandbox toward commercial trajectory tooling. Trust ladder R0–R7 (runnable → documented → unit-validated → flight-validated → Monte Carlo → toolchain APIs → SIL/HIL → governance). Five implementation phases sourced from path_to_perfection.md: hosted demo + SW hygiene, flight telemetry V&V PDF, Rust/WASM native core + 6DOF + NRLMSISE/ECMWF environments, batch dispersion + public benchmark vs RocketPy/GMAT, 3D viz + GNC/SIL + Python API + optimization + reusability, HIL + dual licensing. NASA-STD-7009 M&S V&V framing. Honest disclaimer: not claiming SpaceX internal replacement — credible validation methodology overlap. Cross-links to limitations, science, native-core migration.

### DeltaV Lab Native Physics Core — Escaping the React/TypeScript Ceiling
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-native-physics-core/
**Published:** 2026-07-01
**Tags:** aerospace, deltav-lab, rust, wasm, simulation

Technical migration plan: keep React/TypeScript Mission Control and VAB; extract RK4, atmosphere, drag, Monte Carlo, and future 6DOF into Rust crate (deltav-core) with WASM for browser worker and native/Python CLI for batch runs. Strangler-pattern steps: golden JSON fixtures from TS worker, parity tests, WASM drop-in preserving SharedArrayBuffer layout, pyo3 bindings. Language split table (Rust integrator, Python orchestration, C++ FFI for legacy kernels). Commercial scrutiny: determinism, f64 policy, reproducible Docker builds, coverage gates.

### DeltaV Lab Flight Computer — Teaching Autopilot Without Faking Physics
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-flight-computer/
**Published:** 2026-06-27
**Tags:** aerospace, deltav-lab, guidance

DSL guidance system in FlightScript.ts / FlightComputer.ts. Syntax: WHEN condition THEN action. Variables: ALTITUDE, VELOCITY, APOGEE, FUEL, TIME, DYNAMIC_PRESSURE, etc. Actions: PITCH, THROTTLE, STAGE, SAS modes, ABORT. Runs in physics worker — same integrator as manual flight. F key editor, G key arm. Educational GNC shape, not SIL/HIL certifiable.

### DeltaV Lab Mission Log: RK4, Web Workers, and the KSP Problem
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-mission-log/
**Published:** 2026-06-17 (updated 2026-06-30)
**Tags:** aerospace, deltav-lab

Threading-focused engineering diary. SharedArrayBuffer replaces chatty per-frame postMessage fuckup. 50Hz worker contract, vanilla DOM + esbuild + Vitest stack. Physics derivations and professional-grade audit moved to dedicated transmissions (deltav-lab-why-and-what, deltav-lab-science, deltav-lab-not-professional-grade). Includes Tsiolkovsky equation as teaching anchor.

### Why Vellor Exists — and What It Actually Is
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/vellor-why-and-what/
**Published:** 2026-07-01
**Tags:** pedagogy, vellor, pwa, offline-first
**Series:** Vellor (order 1)

Honest origin story for the free tutoring-management PWA at v4.2.0. Nine years of tutoring exposed overpriced/invasive SaaS and spreadsheets not built for teaching. Scope: dashboard, students, transactions, calendar, achievements, settings — AES-GCM encrypted localStorage, zero server. Corrects prior site error calling Vellor "note-taking" or IndexedDB-based.

### Why I Chose This Tech Stack for Vellor — Honest Tradeoffs
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/vellor-tech-stack/
**Published:** 2026-07-01
**Tags:** vellor, react, typescript, pwa, offline-first
**Series:** Vellor (order 2)

Stack rationale from github.com/dhaatrik/vellor v4.2.0: React 19, TypeScript 5.7, Vite 6, Zustand 5 slices, Zod 4, React Hook Form 7, Tailwind 3, Framer Motion 11, Radix UI, Recharts 3, jsPDF, @tanstack/react-virtual, Vitest 4, vite-plugin-pwa. Constraints: zero server, solo maintainer, offline-first. Rejected Next.js/Electron as primary paths. Honest limits: localStorage size, PWA cache invalidation, bundle weight.

### Why Vellor Is Free — and What "Zero Terms" Actually Means
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/vellor-free-zero-terms/
**Published:** 2026-07-01
**Tags:** vellor, open-source, pedagogy, privacy
**Series:** Vellor (order 3)

MIT license (Copyright 2026 Dhaatrik Chowdhury), no subscriptions, no data harvesting. "Zero terms" = no SaaS ToS/account lock-in — NOT absence of MIT license or maintenance reality. Comparison table vs typical tutoring SaaS. Connection to DBS Classes axiom: knowledge must be free.

### The Gamification Trap — When Vellor Almost Became a Mobile Game
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/vellor-gamification-trap/
**Published:** 2026-07-01
**Tags:** vellor, ui-ux, pedagogy
**Series:** Vellor (order 4)

Honest fuckup log: points, ranks, 25+ achievements, confetti (canvas-confetti) nearly buried invoicing/quick-log paths. Lesson: gamification is seasoning on Achievements page, not the payment critical path.

### Local-Only Backup Reality — No Server Means You Own Disaster Recovery
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/vellor-local-backup-reality/
**Published:** 2026-07-01
**Tags:** vellor, privacy, offline-first, pwa
**Series:** Vellor (order 5)

AES-GCM localStorage, Recovery Key, JSON export/import, 14-day BackupPromptModal, reconnect backup nudges, secure reset. Tradeoff: privacy without vendor safety net — tutors must export or lose data on device failure.

### Vellor Mission Log: Power-Tutor Ops and the Storage Correction
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/vellor-power-tutor-log/
**Published:** 2026-06-17 (updated 2026-07-01)
**Tags:** pedagogy, vellor, pwa, offline-first
**Series:** Vellor (order 6)

Operational engineering diary for Power-Tutor era (v4.2.0). Corrects prior IndexedDB claim — repo uses AES-GCM encrypted localStorage. Covers roster virtualization, O(N) filters, PWA cache versioning, feature scope discipline, DBS Classes philosophy link. Supporting log — origin/stack/licensing in dedicated series posts.

### Teaching From First Principles: A Mission Log on How I Actually Teach
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/teaching-from-first-principles/
**Published:** 2026-06-17
**Tags:** pedagogy

Comprehensive first-person teaching philosophy transmission. Core axiom: knowledge must be free with zero terms. Methodology pipeline: Observe → Question → Model → Formalize (equations last). Covers sibling-centric "Dhaatu Bhaiyaa" trust model, context-rich teaching (kitchens, streets, open skies), attention engineering via narrative lesson structure, code-switching across Class 9 through university levels, and honest acknowledgment of YouTube channel failure as a lesson in systems over motivation.

### Why I Started DBS Classes: The Physics of Curiosity
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/why-i-started-dbs-classes/
**Published:** 2026-06-16
**Tags:** pedagogy, youtube

First-person origin story. After 9 years tutoring ~200 students across classrooms, coaching centers, and online groups, I founded DBS Classes on October 31, 2022 to combat rote memorization. Three curriculum pillars: intuitive physics/math, first-principles thinking, and bridging equations to real observations (bus wheels, cricket ball curve, football kinematics). Produced 20 video lessons on dimensional analysis, trigonometry, and kinematics. Core philosophy: "Education Is Not Free BUT KNOWLEDGE IS FREE" with zero terms and conditions.

### How I Teach: Bus Wheels, Kitchen Labs, and Open Skies
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/my-ways-of-teaching/
**Published:** 2026-06-16
**Tags:** pedagogy

First-person mission log on teaching methodology, led by the bus wheel observation that sparked kinematics intuition on a city street. Kitchen demonstrations teach thermodynamics (Leidenfrost effect, conduction/convection). Outdoor classrooms for trigonometry and optics. Streets as mechanics labs for angular momentum, torque, and rolling resistance. Includes Pedagogy Pipeline: Observation → Conceptualization → Intuitive Map → Mathematics. Covers sibling-centric "Dhaatu Bhaiyaa" relationship model, attention engineering, and adaptive feedback across student levels.

### Why I Stopped Uploading: An Honest Audit of Consistency and Flaws
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/why-i-stopped-youtube-classes/
**Published:** 2026-06-16
**Tags:** pedagogy, youtube

First-person post-mortem. Final upload "Point Mass is a Myth" on September 15, 2023 became the tombstone of active production after 20 videos. Root causes: (1) solo production bottleneck and novelty fade, (2) illusion of "next week" compounding into years, (3) relying on motivation instead of systems. Includes Motivation vs. Systems comparison table. Lessons applied to engineering: reduce friction, lower cognitive load, sustainable pace. Channel remains as archive and reminder of structural discipline.

### DeltaV Lab Scrollytelling Demo — Orbital Insertion Walkthrough
**URL:** https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/deltav-lab-scrollytelling-demo/
**Published:** 2026-05-29 (updated 2026-06-30)
**Tags:** aerospace, physics, ui-ux, deltav-lab, scrollytell

Working demo of the site Scrollytell component (src/components/Scrollytell.astro) — four scroll steps with sticky telemetry visuals (pad/checklist, Max Q, MECO/staging, circularization). Tied to DeltaV Lab flight vocabulary: DSL variables (ALTITUDE, DYNAMIC_PRESSURE, APOGEE), keyboard controls (C, SPACE, M, E), 50Hz worker physics, honest label that HUD numbers are teaching graphics not live sim export. Includes author API table (stepCount, visual-N/step-N slots, IntersectionObserver behavior). Tsiolkovsky appendix + Python snippet. Cross-links to deltav-lab-why-and-what, science, limitations transmissions.

---

## Projects

### DeltaV Lab
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/deltav-lab/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/professional-rocket-launch-simulation
- **Description**: Open-source browser rocket simulation — VAB multi-stage assembly (Merlin/Raptor/RL-10), Mission Control flight with 50Hz RK4 Web Worker physics, SharedArrayBuffer telemetry, DSL flight computer, FTS, instructor fault injector, black box CSV export, analysis.html post-flight view. 2D teaching sandbox — not flight-certified. Key transmissions: deltav-lab-why-and-what, deltav-lab-science, deltav-lab-not-professional-grade, deltav-lab-whats-next (professional roadmap), deltav-lab-native-physics-core (Rust/WASM migration).

### Vellor
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/vellor/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/vellor
- **Description**: Free MIT-licensed offline tutoring-management PWA at v4.2.0 (Power-Tutor era). Students, lessons, payments, PDF invoices, calendar, gamification, white-label branding. 100% client-side AES-GCM encrypted localStorage — no server, no subscription. transmissionTag: vellor. Key transmissions: vellor-why-and-what, vellor-tech-stack, vellor-free-zero-terms, vellor-gamification-trap, vellor-local-backup-reality, vellor-power-tutor-log.

### FuelDrop
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/fueldrop/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/fueldrop
- **Description**: Frontend-only fuel delivery UX demo (v3.0.0) — React 19 SPA with customer ordering, captain dashboard (/captain), fleet mode, Leaflet map UI, vite-plugin-pwa, simulated OTP 1234. No backend, no WebSockets, no payments. MIT licensed.
- **Transmissions**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/fueldrop-why-and-what/ , https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/fueldrop-tech-stack/ , https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/fueldrop-free-demo-scope/

### The Infinite Intelligence
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/the-infinite-intelligence/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/the-infinite-intelligence
- **Description**: Client-side BYOK multi-agent council (v4.0.0) — parallel/sequential/round-robin topologies, four-agent default squad, Beta Mode, first-principles phase, HITL steering, session branching, PDF/Markdown export via gemma-4-31b-it. No backend.
- **Transmissions**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/infinite-intelligence-why-and-what/ , https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/infinite-intelligence-tech-stack/ , https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/infinite-intelligence-byok-guardrails/

### Instant App Opener
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/instant-app-opener/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/instant-app-opener
- **Description**: Next.js 15 web app (v0.2.0) that parses YouTube, X, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and Spotify URLs into mobile deep-link URIs. Outputs copy, Web Share, and QR handoff. Not Electron, not a tray launcher.
- **Transmission**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/instant-app-opener-why-and-what/

### Glassbox
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/glassbox/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/glassbox
- **Description**: Cyberpunk organizational feedback terminal (v4.2.1) — employee signals, drag-and-drop Kanban neural grid, MoM Recharts metrics, Gemini sentiment and AI insight reports. BYOK API key. Not VM2, not a code sandbox.
- **Transmission**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/glassbox-why-and-what/

### FinTrack
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/expense-vs-investment-tracker/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/expense-vs-investment-tracker
- **Description**: Mindful dual-ledger personal finance app (v1.0.0) — expenses vs personal investments, Recharts dashboards, Zustand 5, JSON export/import. Client-side, no bank sync. Not Chart.js.
- **Transmission**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/fintrack-why-and-what/

### Seamless QR Dining
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/seamless-qr-dining/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/seamless-qr-dining
- **Description**: Next.js 16 restaurant ordering demo (v3.0.0) — QR table join (?table=N), customer menu/cart, kitchen dashboard (/kitchen), React Context order sync, simulated OTP, 77 Jest tests. Not WebSocket production infra, no payments, in-memory orders.
- **Transmissions**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/seamless-qr-dining-why-and-what/ , https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/seamless-qr-dining-tech-stack/ , https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/seamless-qr-dining-prototype-honesty/

### Vireo Wellness
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/vireo-wellness/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/vireo-wellness
- **Description**: Wellness UI demo (v2.0.0) — React 19.1 SPA with mock data: dashboard nutrition stats, meal logging, blood glucose charts (Recharts), simulated Bluetooth device pairing. Permanent dark theme. Not PWA, not IndexedDB persistence, not meditation timer.
- **Transmission**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/vireo-wellness-why-and-what/

### Bill Express
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/bill-express/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/bill-express
- **Description**: Full-stack India-GST Point of Sale (v1.0.0) — React 19 + Vite 6 frontend, Express + SQLite backend, product inventory (HSN/GST), customer GSTIN directory, B2B/B2C invoices with SGST/CGST/IGST splits. Not client-only jsPDF.
- **Transmission**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/bill-express-why-and-what/

### MarkPDF
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/free-markdown-to-pdf-converter/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/free-markdown-to-pdf-converter
- **Description**: Client-only markdown-to-PDF (v1.0.0) — react-markdown + remark-gfm preview, react-syntax-highlighter, typography/margin settings, export via browser print Save as PDF. MIT licensed. No KaTeX, no jsPDF, no server.
- **Transmissions**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/markpdf-why-and-what/ , https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/markpdf-tech-stack/ , https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/markpdf-free-browser-limits/

### Read Aloud Chrome Extension
- **URL**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/projects/readaloud_chromeextension/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dhaatrik/ReadAloud_ChromeExtension
- **Description**: MV3 Chrome extension (v4.0.0) — chrome.tts article reading, Intl.Segmenter sentence split, CSS Custom Highlight API, skip keyboard shortcuts, session persistence across service worker restarts. 59 tests, 141 assertions, CI zip artifact. Not Web Store published.
- **Transmission**: https://dhaatrik.github.io/transmissions/read-aloud-why-and-what/

---

## v4.0.0 Feature Additions

### Design System
- **Canonical `.glass-surface` base class**: All glassmorphic surfaces (bento cards, search bar, popover dialogs) now consume a single token system (`--glass-bg-raw`, `--glass-border-raw`, `--neon-glow-1-rgb`, `--neon-glow-2-rgb`). No component duplicates `rgba()` values — all update atomically when the theme changes.
- **`--glass-border-opacity` increased**: Light-mode rest state 0.08 → 0.12, hover 0.2 → 0.25 to meet WCAG 1.4.11 non-text contrast on white backgrounds.

### Scroll Reveal System
- **`data-reveal-delay` attribute**: Any `.reveal-on-scroll` element can declare `data-reveal-delay="N"` (milliseconds) for declarative per-element staggering without a `.reveal-stagger` parent.
- **`.blueprint-reveal` applied to hero parallax SVG**: The grid-background fades in on load, reinforcing mission-control aesthetics.
- **Hero CTAs migrated**: The `animate-fade-in-up + delay-{N}` system is replaced with the unified `reveal-on-scroll + data-reveal-delay` approach, removing a parallel animation system from the codebase.

### Accessibility (v4.0.0)
- **Terminal search combobox**: Full WAI-ARIA 1.2 combobox pattern (role="combobox", role="listbox", role="option", aria-expanded, aria-activedescendant).
- **IMPACT.LOG meter**: pain_level bar carries `role="meter"`, `aria-label="Impact level: N out of 5"`, `aria-valuenow`, `aria-valuemin`, `aria-valuemax`.
- **Identity rotator**: `aria-live="off"` prevents screen readers from announcing every rotation.

### Footer Diagnostics (v4.0.0)
- `CURRENT_STUDY`: Hand-updated constant. Current topic: soil chemistry & crop physiology from first principles.
- `LATEST_INSIGHT`: Dynamically sourced from `posts[0].data.description` — auto-updates with every new transmission.
- `PAGES.INDEXED`: Auto-computed as `posts.length + projects.length + 4`.
- `SYS.LOAD`: From `navigator.hardwareConcurrency` (CPU core count).
- `SYS.LATENCY`: From `PerformanceNavigationTiming.responseStart - requestStart`.

### Reading List (v4.0.0)
- Added: *The Design of Everyday Things* (Don Norman) — systems thinking applied to UX decisions.
- Added: *Thinking, Fast and Slow* (Daniel Kahneman) — marked `IN_PROGRESS`.
- All existing book hints rewritten as first-person personal reactions, not back-cover descriptions.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Who is Dhaatrik Chowdhury?**
A: Dhaatrik Chowdhury is an Entrepreneur and AI Engineer from India with 9 years of teaching experience in physics and mathematics and a focus on building AI-driven software solutions.

**Q: What is DBS Classes?**
A: DBS Classes stands for "Dhaatu Bhaiyaa's Classes" — a free YouTube channel for physics and mathematics education founded on October 31, 2022 by Dhaatrik Chowdhury. It produced 20 educational videos before ceasing uploads on September 15, 2023.

**Q: What is Dhaatrik's teaching philosophy?**
A: Dhaatrik believes in first-principles teaching where students learn through observation, intuition, and real-world experimentation rather than rote memorization. His core axiom is: "Education Is Not Free BUT KNOWLEDGE IS FREE" — shared with zero terms and conditions.

**Q: Why did Dhaatrik stop uploading on YouTube?**
A: Dhaatrik stopped due to internal execution failures: solo production bottleneck, loss of focus from other projects, and relying on motivation rather than building systematic production workflows. He has publicly documented this as a personal failure and learning experience.

---

## Agent / coding-agent instructions

Repository entry points: `AGENTS.md` (routing), `GEMINI.md` (SEO/AEO/GEO summary → `dhaatrik-seo-legacy` skill). Project skills live in `.agents/skills/`:

- **dhaatrik-writing-style** — voice and tone for all user-facing copy
- **dhaatrik-mission-report** — Mission Report structure for projects and transmissions
- **dhaatrik-astro-site** — Astro 6 architecture, components, tests, deployment
- **dhaatrik-visual-system** — sci-fi mission-control UI and design tokens
- **dhaatrik-seo-legacy** — honest SEO, JSON-LD, OG, sitemap/RSS

Index: `.agents/README.md`
